must_do.full_text:
Introducing Cursor for iOS.

Build from anywhere by launching always-on cloud agents. Or remotely control agents running on your computer from the app.

Composer 2.5 is 75% off in the app now through July 5. https://t.co/dFxQyrgmBb
must_do.summary: Cursor推出iOS版本，支持云端Agent和远程控制。Composer 2.5限时75折优惠至7月5日。具体产品发布、明确价格折扣。
angles: Cursor终于上iOS：云端Agent编程革命来了
Composer 2.5限时75折，AI编程工具大战升温
随处编程新体验：Cursor远程Agent控制演示

must_do.full_text:
A 15-year-old dream has come true today. I started a PhD with the dream of creating a system that chants any Sanskrit shloka perfectly.

And here I am opening sourcing 𝐕𝐚𝐠𝐝𝐡𝐞𝐧𝐮 - 𝐀 𝐯ṛ𝐭𝐭𝐚 (𝐦𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐫) 𝐚𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐞 ś𝐥𝐨𝐤𝐚-𝐭𝐨-𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐞𝐱𝐭-𝐭𝐨-𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐞𝐜𝐡 https://t.co/kHoLP7DbXe
must_do.summary: 15年梦想成真！开源Vagdhenu系统，可完美诵唱梵文诗句，支持韵律感知的文本转语音。创始人从PhD开始追梦到今日开源。
angles: 15年梦想今朝实现：梵文诵唱AI系统开源
韵律感知的梵文TTS：Vagdhenu如何理解古老诗歌
从PhD到开源：一个印度工程师的AI文化使命

must_do.full_text:
California 🤝 @AnthropicAI

We're entering a partnership to strengthen cybersecurity and provide @ClaudeAI to state agencies — and California local governments — at a 50% discount.

The Golden State helped build Silicon Valley — and every Californian should benefit from the

If you want your agent to run in the foreground, just tell Claude

must_do.full_text:
Chess engines tell you the best move.

But grandmasters are human, they don’t always play it.

So I built "Kibitz": a human move predictor for chess broadcasts. I trained this model on my Nvidia RTX 5080. 

Then I made it run as a business by itself.

A channel buys the overlay, https://t.co/30GqoPPvlE
must_do.summary: 开发者用Nvidia RTX 5080训练国际象棋人类走法预测模型Kibitz，并将其商业化。单产品技术叙事，有创意应用。
angles: 我用AI预测棋手真实走法，靠直播赚钱
Kibitz：国际象棋直播的AI新玩法
RTX 5080训练的人类棋手预测器

must_do.full_text:
My entire AI stack is now Chinese 🇨🇳

87% cheaper. same revenue

swaps by task:

1. reasoning / backend brain
   Opus 4.8 → Kimi K2.7
   benchmark gap: ~8%  ·  price: ~11x cheaper

2. code generation
   GPT-5.5 → Qwen 3.7 Max
   benchmark gap: ~18%  ·  price: ~7x cheaper

3. https://t.co/X1B8ClS7fa
must_do.summary: 工程师用中文AI模型替换全栈，成本降87%收入不变。Kimi K2.7替代Opus（性能差8%便宜11倍），Qwen 3.7替代GPT-5.5（性能差18%便宜7倍）。
angles: 成本降87%！用中文AI模型替换OpenAI全栈方案
Kimi vs Opus、Qwen vs GPT-5.5：性能对标价格碾压
5分钟学会：如何用国产模型搭建高效AI后端

priority.full_text:
American and European enterprises will ditch OpenAI and anthropic and adopt Chinese models. Here’s why: 
1. They can host Chinese models under their own GPUs so it’s still compliant and they would argue they have more control. 
2. they will post train with their own data on top
priority.summary: 观点：欧美企业将采用中国AI模型替代OpenAI和Anthropic，理由包括本地部署和数据控制。AI地缘政治趋势分析。
